19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Manual Procedures - Implementation
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	test -z "${ZRBGM_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
25	ZRBGM_SOURCED=1
26	
27	######################################################################
28	# Internal Functions (zrbgm_*)
29	
30	zrbgm_kindle() {
31	  test -z "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm already kindled"
32	
33	  local z_use_color=0
34	  if test -z "${NO_COLOR:-}" && test "${BURE_COLOR:-0}" = "1"; then
35	    z_use_color=1
36	  fi
37	
38	  if test "${z_use_color}" = "1"; then
39	    readonly ZRBGM_R="\033[0m"         # Reset
40	    readonly ZRBGM_S="\033[1;37m"      # Section (bright white)
41	    readonly ZRBGM_C="\033[36m"        # Command (cyan)
42	    readonly ZRBGM_W="\033[35m"        # Website (magenta)
43	    readonly ZRBGM_Y="\033[1;33m"      # Warning (bright yellow)
44	    readonly ZRBGM_CR="\033[1;31m"     # Critical (bright red)
45	  else
46	    readonly ZRBGM_R=""                # No color, or disabled
47	    readonly ZRBGM_S=""                # No color, or disabled
48	    readonly ZRBGM_C=""                # No color, or disabled
49	    readonly ZRBGM_W=""                # No color, or disabled
50	    readonly ZRBGM_Y=""                # No color, or disabled
51	    readonly ZRBGM_CR=""               # No color, or disabled
52	  fi
53	
54	  # Click modifier: Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere
55	  case "$(uname -s)" in
56	    Darwin) readonly ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Cmd" ;;
57	    *)      readonly ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Ctrl" ;;
58	  esac
59	
60	  readonly ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE="${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
61	  readonly ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME="${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE##*/}"
62	  readonly ZRBGM_RBRR_FILE="${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
63	
64	
65	  readonly ZRBGM_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgm_"
66	  readonly ZRBGM_LIST_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_response.json"
67	  readonly ZRBGM_LIST_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_code.txt"
68	  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_REQUEST="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_request.json"
69	  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_response.json"
70	  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_code.txt"
71	  readonly ZRBGM_DELETE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_response.json"
72	  readonly ZRBGM_DELETE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_code.txt"
73	  readonly ZRBGM_KEY_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_response.json"
74	  readonly ZRBGM_KEY_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_code.txt"
75	  readonly ZRBGM_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_response.json"
76	  readonly ZRBGM_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_code.txt"
77	  readonly ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_response.json"
78	  readonly ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_code.txt"
79	
80	  # Onboarding default nameplate moniker
81	  readonly ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_MONIKER="tadmor"
82	  readonly ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_NAMEPLATE="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_MONIKER}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"
83	
84	  readonly ZRBGM_KINDLED=1
85	}
86	
87	zrbgm_sentinel() {
88	  test "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgm not kindled - call zrbgm_kindle first"
89	}
90	
91	zrbgm_enforce() {
92	  zrbgm_sentinel
93	  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
94	  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
95	  zrbgc_sentinel
96	}
97	
98	zrbgm_show() {
99	  zrbgm_sentinel
100	  printf '%b\n' "${1:-}"
101	}
102	
103	zrbgm_s1()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
104	zrbgm_s2()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
105	zrbgm_s3()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
106	
107	zrbgm_e()       { zrbgm_show "";                                                             }
108	zrbgm_d()       { zrbgm_show "${1}";                                                         }
109	zrbgm_dc()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
110	zrbgm_dcd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
111	zrbgm_dcdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
112	zrbgm_dm()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
113	zrbgm_dmd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
114	zrbgm_dmdr()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_CR}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";    }
115	zrbgm_dmdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
116	zrbgm_dwdwd()   { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}${5}"; }
117	zrbgm_dy()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_Y}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
118	
119	zrbgm_de()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_CR}${2}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
120	
121	zrbgm_cmd()     { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_C}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
122	zrbgm_critic()  { zrbgm_show "\n${ZRBGM_CR} CRITICAL SECURITY WARNING: ${1}${ZRBGM_R}\n"; }
123	
124	zrbgm_dld() {
125	  local z_default="${1:-}"
126	  local z_label="${2:-}"
127	  local z_url="${3:-}"
128	  local z_coda="${4:-}"
129	  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "missing label"
130	  test -n "${z_url}"   || buc_die "missing url"
131	
132	  # Blue + underline style, wrapped in OSC 8 hyperlink
133	  printf '%s\e[34;4m\e]8;;%s\a%s\e]8;;\a\e[0m%s\n' "${z_default}" "${z_url}" "${z_label}" "${z_coda}"
134	}
135	
136	
137	######################################################################
138	# External Functions (rbgm_*)
139	
140	rbgm_payor_establish() {
141	  zrbgm_sentinel
142	
143	  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor Establishment procedure for OAuth authentication"
144	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
145	
146	  buh_section  "Manual Payor OAuth Establishment Procedure"
147	  buh_t        "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME} now uses OAuth 2.0 for individual developer accounts."
148	  buh_t        "This resolves project creation limitations for personal Google accounts."
149	  buh_e
150	  buh_section  "Key:"
151	  buh_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
152	  buh_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
153	  buh_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
154	  buh_e
155	  buh_section  "1. Confirm Payor Regime:"
156	  buh_tc       "   File: " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
157	  buh_tc       "   RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID: " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
158	  buh_t        "   (You will discover RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID later in step 5)"
159	  buh_e
160	  buh_t        "   First time setup? Set a timestamped project ID with:"
161	  buh_c        "   sed -i '' 's/^RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=.*/RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-$(date "${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT}")/' ${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
162	  buh_e
163	  buh_section  "2. Check if Project Already Exists:"
164	  buh_t        "   Before creating a new project, verify the configured ID is not already in use:"
165	  buh_link     "   1. Check existing projects: " "Google Cloud Project List" "https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-resource-manager"
166	  buh_tu       "   2. Look for a project with ID " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
167	  buh_t        "      - Hover over project IDs to verify the full ID matches your configured value"
168	  buh_tctu     "   3. If you " "find the project" " with matching ID, it already exists - edit " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME}"
169	  buh_t        "      and re-run this procedure"
170	  buh_t        "   4. If you don't find it, proceed to step 3 to create it"
171	  buh_e
172	  buh_section  "3. Create Payor Project:"
173	  buh_link     "   1. Open browser to: " "Google Cloud Project Create" "https://console.cloud.google.com/projectcreate"
174	  buh_t        "   2. Ensure signed in with intended Google account (check top-right avatar)"
175	  buh_t        "   3. Configure new project:"
176	  buh_tc       "      - Project name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
177	  buh_t        "      - Project ID: Google will auto-generate a value; click Edit to replace it with:"
178	  buh_tc       "        " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
179	  buh_tut      "      - Location: " "No organization" " (required for this guide; organization affiliation is advanced)"
180	  buh_tu       "   4. Click " "CREATE"
181	  buh_tut      "   5. Wait for " "Creating project..." " notification to complete"
182	  buh_e
183	  buh_section  "4. Verify Project Creation:"
184	  buh_t        "   Verify that your rbrp.env configuration matches the created project:"
185	  buh_link     "   1. Test this link: " "Google Cloud APIs Dashboard" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/dashboard?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
186	  buh_t        "   2. If the page loads and shows your project, your configuration is correct"
187	  buh_tut      "   3. If you see " "You need additional access" ", wait a few minutes and refresh the page"
188	  buh_link     "      GCP IAM changes are eventually consistent: " "Access Change Propagation" "https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/access-change-propagation"
189	  buh_e
190	  buh_section  "5. Configure Billing Account:"
191	  buh_link     "   1. Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing"
192	  buh_t        "      If no billing accounts exist:"
193	  buh_tu       "          a. Click " "CREATE ACCOUNT"
194	  buh_t        "          b. Configure payment method and submit"
195	  buh_tu       "          c. Copy new " "Account ID" " from table"
196	  buh_t        "      else if single Open account exists:"
197	  buh_tu       "          a. Copy the " "Account ID" " value"
198	  buh_t        "      else if multiple Open accounts exist:"
199	  buh_t        "          a. Choose account for Recipe Bottle funding"
200	  buh_tu       "          b. Copy chosen " "Account ID" " value"
201	  buh_link     "   2. Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing Projects" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/projects"
202	  buh_tu       "   3. Save the billing account ID to your " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
203	  buh_tctu     "      Record as: " "RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID=" " # " "Value from Account ID column"
204	  buh_t        "   4. Find project row with ID matching your payor project (not name) and get the Account ID value"
205	  buh_tu       "   5. Update " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}" " and re-display this procedure."
206	  buh_e
207	  buh_section  "6. Link Billing to Payor Project:"
208	  buh_t        "   Link your billing account to the newly created project."
209	  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing Account Management" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/manage"
210	  buh_t        "   1. The page loads to your default billing account."
211	  buh_tu       "   2. If you have multiple billing accounts, use the " "Select a billing account" " dropdown at top"
212	  buh_t        "      - Choose the account matching your RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID"
213	  buh_t        "   3. Look for the section " "Projects linked to this billing account"
214	  buh_t        "   4. Verify your payor project appears in the table:"
215	  buh_tc       "      - Project name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
216	  buh_tc       "      - Project ID: " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
217	  buh_t        "   5. If project is NOT listed and billing needs to be enabled:"
218	  buh_link     "      - Go to: " "Project Billing" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/linkedaccount?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
219	  buh_tu       "      - Click " "Link a Billing Account"
220	  buh_t        "      - Select your billing account and confirm"
221	  buh_e
222	  buh_section  "7. Enable Required APIs:"
223	  buh_link     "   Go to: " "APIs & Services for your payor project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/dashboard?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
224	  buh_tu       "   1. Click " "+ ENABLE APIS AND SERVICES"
225	  buh_t        "   2. Search for and enable these APIs:"
226	  buh_tc       "      - " "Cloud Resource Manager API"
227	  buh_tc       "      - " "Cloud Billing API"
228	  buh_tct      "      - " "Service Usage API" " (often enabled by default, look for green check)"
229	  buh_tc       "      - " "IAM Service Account Credentials API"
230	  buh_tc       "      - " "Artifact Registry API"
231	  buh_t        "   These enable programmatic depot management operations."
232	  buh_e
233	  buh_section  "8. Configure OAuth Consent Screen:"
234	  buh_link     "   Go to: " "OAuth consent screen" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials/consent?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
235	  buh_tu       "   1. The console displays " "Google Auth Platform not configured yet"
236	  buh_tu       "   2. Click " "Get started"
237	  buh_t        "   3. Complete the Project Configuration wizard:"
238	  buh_t        "      Step 1 - App Information:"
239	  buh_tc       "        - App name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
240	  buh_t        "        - User support email: (your email)"
241	  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
242	  buh_t        "      Step 2 - Audience:"
243	  buh_tu       "        - Select " "External"
244	  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
245	  buh_t        "      Step 3 - Contact Information:"
246	  buh_t        "        - Email addresses: (your email), press Enter"
247	  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
248	  buh_t        "      Step 4 - Finish:"
249	  buh_tu       "        - Check " "I agree to the Google API Services: User Data Policy"
250	  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Continue"
251	  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Create"
252	  buh_e
253	  buh_t        "   4. Add your email as a test user (avoids Google app verification process):"
254	  buh_tu       "      1. Click " "Audience" " in left sidebar"
255	  buh_tu       "      2. Scroll down to section " "Test users"
256	  buh_tu       "      3. Click " "+ Add users"
257	  buh_tut      "      4. Right-side panel titled " "Add Users" " slides in"
258	  buh_t        "      5. Enter your email address in the field"
259	  buh_tu       "      6. Click " "Save"
260	  buh_tut      "      7. Verify " "1 user" " appears in OAuth user cap"
261	  buh_e
262	  buh_section  "9. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID:"
263	  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Credentials" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
264	  buh_tu       "   1. From top bar, click " "+ Create credentials"
265	  buh_tu       "   2. Select " "OAuth client ID"
266	  buh_tu       "   3. Application type: " "Desktop app"
267	  buh_tc       "   4. Name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
268	  buh_tu       "   5. Click " "CREATE"
269	  buh_tut      "   6. Popup titled " "OAuth client created" " displays client ID and secret"
270	  buh_tu       "   7. Click " "Download JSON"
271	  buh_tutu     "   8. Click " "OK" " ; browser downloads " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
272	  buh_tW       "      " "CRITICAL: Save securely - contains client secret"
273	  buh_e
274	  buh_section  "10. Install OAuth Credentials:"
275	  buh_t        "   Run:"
276	  buh_c        "   rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/payor-oauth.json"
277	  buh_t        "   This will guide you through OAuth authorization and complete the setup."
278	
279	  buc_success "OAuth Payor establishment procedure displayed"
280	}
281	
282	rbgm_payor_refresh() {
283	  zrbgm_sentinel
284	
285	  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure"
286	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
287	
288	  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Payor OAuth Credential Installation/Refresh Procedure"
289	  zrbgm_d      "Use this for initial credential setup after payor establishment or to refresh expired/compromised credentials."
290	  zrbgm_d      "Testing mode refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use."
291	  zrbgm_e
292	  zrbgm_s2     "When to use this procedure:"
293	  zrbgm_d      "  - Initial setup after running rbgm_payor_establish"
294	  zrbgm_d      "  - Payor operations return 401/403 errors"
295	  zrbgm_d      "  - OAuth client secret compromised"
296	  zrbgm_d      "  - 6+ months since last Payor operation"
297	  zrbgm_e
298	  zrbgm_s2     "1. Obtain OAuth Credentials:"
299	  zrbgm_d      "   For initial setup:"
300	  zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"

file.content:
#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GCP Manual Procedures - Implementation

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGM_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGM_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgm_*)

zrbgm_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgm already kindled"

  local z_use_color=0
  if test -z "${NO_COLOR:-}" && test "${BURE_COLOR:-0}" = "1"; then
    z_use_color=1
  fi

  if test "${z_use_color}" = "1"; then
    readonly ZRBGM_R="\033[0m"         # Reset
    readonly ZRBGM_S="\033[1;37m"      # Section (bright white)
    readonly ZRBGM_C="\033[36m"        # Command (cyan)
    readonly ZRBGM_W="\033[35m"        # Website (magenta)
    readonly ZRBGM_Y="\033[1;33m"      # Warning (bright yellow)
    readonly ZRBGM_CR="\033[1;31m"     # Critical (bright red)
  else
    readonly ZRBGM_R=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_S=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_C=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_W=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_Y=""                # No color, or disabled
    readonly ZRBGM_CR=""               # No color, or disabled
  fi

  # Click modifier: Cmd on macOS, Ctrl elsewhere
  case "$(uname -s)" in
    Darwin) readonly ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Cmd" ;;
    *)      readonly ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD="Ctrl" ;;
  esac

  readonly ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE="${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
  readonly ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME="${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE##*/}"
  readonly ZRBGM_RBRR_FILE="${RBBC_rbrr_file}"


  readonly ZRBGM_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgm_"
  readonly ZRBGM_LIST_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_LIST_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}list_code.txt"
  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_REQUEST="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_request.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_CREATE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}create_code.txt"
  readonly ZRBGM_DELETE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_DELETE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}delete_code.txt"
  readonly ZRBGM_KEY_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_KEY_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}key_code.txt"
  readonly ZRBGM_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}role_code.txt"
  readonly ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_RESPONSE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGM_REPO_ROLE_CODE="${ZRBGM_PREFIX}repo_role_code.txt"

  # Onboarding default nameplate moniker
  readonly ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_MONIKER="tadmor"
  readonly ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_NAMEPLATE="${RBBC_dot_dir}/${ZRBGM_ONBOARDING_MONIKER}/${RBCC_rbrn_file}"

  readonly ZRBGM_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgm_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGM_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgm not kindled - call zrbgm_kindle first"
}

zrbgm_enforce() {
  zrbgm_sentinel
  test -n "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"
  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"
  zrbgc_sentinel
}

zrbgm_show() {
  zrbgm_sentinel
  printf '%b\n' "${1:-}"
}

zrbgm_s1()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
zrbgm_s2()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
zrbgm_s3()      { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_S}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }

zrbgm_e()       { zrbgm_show "";                                                             }
zrbgm_d()       { zrbgm_show "${1}";                                                         }
zrbgm_dc()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
zrbgm_dcd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
zrbgm_dcdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_C}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
zrbgm_dm()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }
zrbgm_dmd()     { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}";                             }
zrbgm_dmdr()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_CR}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";    }
zrbgm_dmdm()    { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}";     }
zrbgm_dwdwd()   { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_W}${2}${ZRBGM_R}${3}${ZRBGM_W}${4}${ZRBGM_R}${5}"; }
zrbgm_dy()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_Y}${2}${ZRBGM_R}";                                 }

zrbgm_de()      { zrbgm_show "${1}${ZRBGM_CR}${2}${ZRBGM_R}"; }

zrbgm_cmd()     { zrbgm_show "${ZRBGM_C}${1}${ZRBGM_R}"; }
zrbgm_critic()  { zrbgm_show "\n${ZRBGM_CR} CRITICAL SECURITY WARNING: ${1}${ZRBGM_R}\n"; }

zrbgm_dld() {
  local z_default="${1:-}"
  local z_label="${2:-}"
  local z_url="${3:-}"
  local z_coda="${4:-}"
  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "missing label"
  test -n "${z_url}"   || buc_die "missing url"

  # Blue + underline style, wrapped in OSC 8 hyperlink
  printf '%s\e[34;4m\e]8;;%s\a%s\e]8;;\a\e[0m%s\n' "${z_default}" "${z_url}" "${z_label}" "${z_coda}"
}


######################################################################
# External Functions (rbgm_*)

rbgm_payor_establish() {
  zrbgm_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor Establishment procedure for OAuth authentication"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buh_section  "Manual Payor OAuth Establishment Procedure"
  buh_t        "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME} now uses OAuth 2.0 for individual developer accounts."
  buh_t        "This resolves project creation limitations for personal Google accounts."
  buh_e
  buh_section  "Key:"
  buh_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
  buh_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
  buh_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "1. Confirm Payor Regime:"
  buh_tc       "   File: " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
  buh_tc       "   RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID: " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_t        "   (You will discover RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID later in step 5)"
  buh_e
  buh_t        "   First time setup? Set a timestamped project ID with:"
  buh_c        "   sed -i '' 's/^RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=.*/RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-$(date "${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT}")/' ${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "2. Check if Project Already Exists:"
  buh_t        "   Before creating a new project, verify the configured ID is not already in use:"
  buh_link     "   1. Check existing projects: " "Google Cloud Project List" "https://console.cloud.google.com/cloud-resource-manager"
  buh_tu       "   2. Look for a project with ID " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_t        "      - Hover over project IDs to verify the full ID matches your configured value"
  buh_tctu     "   3. If you " "find the project" " with matching ID, it already exists - edit " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE_BASENAME}"
  buh_t        "      and re-run this procedure"
  buh_t        "   4. If you don't find it, proceed to step 3 to create it"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "3. Create Payor Project:"
  buh_link     "   1. Open browser to: " "Google Cloud Project Create" "https://console.cloud.google.com/projectcreate"
  buh_t        "   2. Ensure signed in with intended Google account (check top-right avatar)"
  buh_t        "   3. Configure new project:"
  buh_tc       "      - Project name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
  buh_t        "      - Project ID: Google will auto-generate a value; click Edit to replace it with:"
  buh_tc       "        " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tut      "      - Location: " "No organization" " (required for this guide; organization affiliation is advanced)"
  buh_tu       "   4. Click " "CREATE"
  buh_tut      "   5. Wait for " "Creating project..." " notification to complete"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "4. Verify Project Creation:"
  buh_t        "   Verify that your rbrp.env configuration matches the created project:"
  buh_link     "   1. Test this link: " "Google Cloud APIs Dashboard" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/dashboard?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_t        "   2. If the page loads and shows your project, your configuration is correct"
  buh_tut      "   3. If you see " "You need additional access" ", wait a few minutes and refresh the page"
  buh_link     "      GCP IAM changes are eventually consistent: " "Access Change Propagation" "https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/access-change-propagation"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "5. Configure Billing Account:"
  buh_link     "   1. Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing"
  buh_t        "      If no billing accounts exist:"
  buh_tu       "          a. Click " "CREATE ACCOUNT"
  buh_t        "          b. Configure payment method and submit"
  buh_tu       "          c. Copy new " "Account ID" " from table"
  buh_t        "      else if single Open account exists:"
  buh_tu       "          a. Copy the " "Account ID" " value"
  buh_t        "      else if multiple Open accounts exist:"
  buh_t        "          a. Choose account for Recipe Bottle funding"
  buh_tu       "          b. Copy chosen " "Account ID" " value"
  buh_link     "   2. Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing Projects" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/projects"
  buh_tu       "   3. Save the billing account ID to your " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}"
  buh_tctu     "      Record as: " "RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID=" " # " "Value from Account ID column"
  buh_t        "   4. Find project row with ID matching your payor project (not name) and get the Account ID value"
  buh_tu       "   5. Update " "${ZRBGM_RBRP_FILE}" " and re-display this procedure."
  buh_e
  buh_section  "6. Link Billing to Payor Project:"
  buh_t        "   Link your billing account to the newly created project."
  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Google Cloud Billing Account Management" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/manage"
  buh_t        "   1. The page loads to your default billing account."
  buh_tu       "   2. If you have multiple billing accounts, use the " "Select a billing account" " dropdown at top"
  buh_t        "      - Choose the account matching your RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID"
  buh_t        "   3. Look for the section " "Projects linked to this billing account"
  buh_t        "   4. Verify your payor project appears in the table:"
  buh_tc       "      - Project name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
  buh_tc       "      - Project ID: " "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_t        "   5. If project is NOT listed and billing needs to be enabled:"
  buh_link     "      - Go to: " "Project Billing" "https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/linkedaccount?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tu       "      - Click " "Link a Billing Account"
  buh_t        "      - Select your billing account and confirm"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "7. Enable Required APIs:"
  buh_link     "   Go to: " "APIs & Services for your payor project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/dashboard?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tu       "   1. Click " "+ ENABLE APIS AND SERVICES"
  buh_t        "   2. Search for and enable these APIs:"
  buh_tc       "      - " "Cloud Resource Manager API"
  buh_tc       "      - " "Cloud Billing API"
  buh_tct      "      - " "Service Usage API" " (often enabled by default, look for green check)"
  buh_tc       "      - " "IAM Service Account Credentials API"
  buh_tc       "      - " "Artifact Registry API"
  buh_t        "   These enable programmatic depot management operations."
  buh_e
  buh_section  "8. Configure OAuth Consent Screen:"
  buh_link     "   Go to: " "OAuth consent screen" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials/consent?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tu       "   1. The console displays " "Google Auth Platform not configured yet"
  buh_tu       "   2. Click " "Get started"
  buh_t        "   3. Complete the Project Configuration wizard:"
  buh_t        "      Step 1 - App Information:"
  buh_tc       "        - App name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
  buh_t        "        - User support email: (your email)"
  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
  buh_t        "      Step 2 - Audience:"
  buh_tu       "        - Select " "External"
  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
  buh_t        "      Step 3 - Contact Information:"
  buh_t        "        - Email addresses: (your email), press Enter"
  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Next"
  buh_t        "      Step 4 - Finish:"
  buh_tu       "        - Check " "I agree to the Google API Services: User Data Policy"
  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Continue"
  buh_tu       "        - Click " "Create"
  buh_e
  buh_t        "   4. Add your email as a test user (avoids Google app verification process):"
  buh_tu       "      1. Click " "Audience" " in left sidebar"
  buh_tu       "      2. Scroll down to section " "Test users"
  buh_tu       "      3. Click " "+ Add users"
  buh_tut      "      4. Right-side panel titled " "Add Users" " slides in"
  buh_t        "      5. Enter your email address in the field"
  buh_tu       "      6. Click " "Save"
  buh_tut      "      7. Verify " "1 user" " appears in OAuth user cap"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "9. Create OAuth 2.0 Client ID:"
  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Credentials" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tu       "   1. From top bar, click " "+ Create credentials"
  buh_tu       "   2. Select " "OAuth client ID"
  buh_tu       "   3. Application type: " "Desktop app"
  buh_tc       "   4. Name: " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}"
  buh_tu       "   5. Click " "CREATE"
  buh_tut      "   6. Popup titled " "OAuth client created" " displays client ID and secret"
  buh_tu       "   7. Click " "Download JSON"
  buh_tutu     "   8. Click " "OK" " ; browser downloads " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
  buh_tW       "      " "CRITICAL: Save securely - contains client secret"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "10. Install OAuth Credentials:"
  buh_t        "   Run:"
  buh_c        "   rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/payor-oauth.json"
  buh_t        "   This will guide you through OAuth authorization and complete the setup."

  buc_success "OAuth Payor establishment procedure displayed"
}

rbgm_payor_refresh() {
  zrbgm_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Display the manual Payor OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  zrbgm_s1     "Manual Payor OAuth Credential Installation/Refresh Procedure"
  zrbgm_d      "Use this for initial credential setup after payor establishment or to refresh expired/compromised credentials."
  zrbgm_d      "Testing mode refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use."
  zrbgm_e
  zrbgm_s2     "When to use this procedure:"
  zrbgm_d      "  - Initial setup after running rbgm_payor_establish"
  zrbgm_d      "  - Payor operations return 401/403 errors"
  zrbgm_d      "  - OAuth client secret compromised"
  zrbgm_d      "  - 6+ months since last Payor operation"
  zrbgm_e
  zrbgm_s2     "1. Obtain OAuth Credentials:"
  zrbgm_d      "   For initial setup:"
  zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"

332	
333	rbgm_quota_build() {
334	  zrbgm_sentinel
335	
336	  buc_doc_brief "Display the Cloud Build capacity review procedure to verify machine type and quota settings"
337	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
338	
339	  buh_section  "Cloud Build Concurrent Build Capacity"
340	  buh_t        "Review your build capacity settings to ensure sufficient concurrent build execution."
341	  buh_t        "Recipe Bottle uses a private worker pool — quota is tracked per private pool host project."
342	  buh_e
343	  buh_t        "   Private pool machine types vs concurrency at 10-CPU quota:"
344	  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-2  " "(2 vCPU)   → 5 concurrent builds"
345	  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-8  " "(8 vCPU)   → 1 concurrent build"
346	  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-32 " "(32 vCPU)  → needs 32+ CPU quota"
347	  buh_e
348	  buh_section  "Key:"
349	  buh_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
350	  buh_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
351	  buh_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
352	  buh_e
353	  buh_section  "1. Current Regime Configuration:"
354	  buh_tc       "   RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:          " "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
355	  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCP_REGION:                " "${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
356	  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE:          " "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
357	  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM:             " "${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}"
358	  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS: " "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"
359	  buh_e
360	  buh_t        "   The build preflight gate checks quota automatically before each build."
361	  buh_t        "   It computes: quota_vCPUs / machine_vCPUs >= RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS"
362	  buh_e
363	  buh_section  "2. Check CPU Quota:"
364	  buh_t        "   Private pool quota is tracked under the depot project."
365	  buh_e
366	  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Quotas & System Limits (opens to depot project)" "https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
367	  buh_tu       "   1. Verify project " "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" " is selected in the project picker"
368	  buh_tut      "   2. In the " "Enter property name or value" " filter bar, type:"
369	  buh_tc       "      " "concurrent_private"
370	  buh_tut      "   3. Select " "cloudbuild.googleapis.com/concurrent_private_pool_build_cpus" " from the autocomplete"
371	  buh_t        "   4. Multiple rows appear. Look for the row with Type column showing"
372	  buh_tut      "      " "Quota" " (not System limit) and your region in the Dimensions column"
373	  buh_t        "   5. Note the quota value and current usage percentage"
374	  buh_t        "      If usage is near 100% with one build, the machine type is too large for the quota"
375	  buh_e
376	  buh_section  "3. Request a Quota Increase (if needed):"
377	  buh_tut      "   On the " "Quota" " row identified above:"
378	  buh_tut      "   1. Click the three-dot menu " "⋮" " at the right end of the row"
379	  buh_tu       "   2. Select " "Edit quota"
380	  buh_tu       "   3. In the side panel, enter the new value in the " "New value" " field"
381	  buh_t        "      Recommended: 10 (allows 5 concurrent e2-standard-2 builds across both pools)"
382	  buh_tu       "   4. A " "Request description" " field appears. Enter:"
383	  buh_tc       "      " "Need parallel builds on private worker pool for CI/CD pipeline testing."
384	  buh_tu       "   5. Click " "Next"
385	  buh_t        "   6. Step 2/2 shows contact details (pre-filled from your Google account)"
386	  buh_tu       "   7. Click " "Submit request"
387	  buh_t        "      Increases are typically approved within minutes."
388	  buh_e
389	  buh_section  "4. Confirm Quota Increase:"
390	  buh_t        "   After approval, quotas can take up to 15 minutes to propagate."
391	  buh_link     "   Return to: " "Quotas & System Limits (opens to depot project)" "https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
392	  buh_tut      "   Filter for " "concurrent_private" " again and verify the new value"
393	  buh_t        "   Verify: quota / vCPUs per machine type >= RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS"
394	  buh_tc       "     Current target: " "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS} concurrent builds"
395	  buh_e
396	
397	  buc_success "Cloud Build quota guide displayed"
398	}

400	
401	# Dashboard status line — no sentinel (used pre-kindle by onboarding guide)
402	zrbgm_po_status() {
403	  local -r z_flag="${1:-}"
404	  local -r z_text="${2:-}"
405	  if test "${z_flag}" = "1"; then
406	    buh_ct " [*] " "${z_text}"
407	  else
408	    buh_t " [ ] ${z_text}"
409	  fi
410	}

412	# Extract a KEY=VALUE from a file; stdout empty if missing.  No sourcing.
413	zrbgm_po_extract_capture() {
414	  local -r z_file="${1:-}"
415	  local -r z_key="${2:-}"
416	  test -n "${z_key}"  || return 1
417	  test -f "${z_file}" || return 1
418	  local z_line=""
419	  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
420	    case "${z_line}" in "${z_key}="*) echo "${z_line#"${z_key}="}"; return 0 ;; esac
421	  done < "${z_file}"
422	  return 1
423	}
424	
425	######################################################################
426	# Probe retriever walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_ru1..z_ru4
427	# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
428	#           or direct extraction).
429	# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
430	
431	zrbgm_probe_retriever_units() {
432	  z_ru1=0; z_ru2=0; z_ru3=0; z_ru4=0
433	
434	  # Unit 1: Retriever credential file exists
435	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
436	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
437	    z_ru1=1
438	  fi
439	
440	  # Units 2-4 require Docker
441	  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi
442	
443	  # Unit 2: Any image from this depot's GAR exists locally
444	  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
445	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
446	    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
447	    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
448	  fi
449	  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
450	    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
451	    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
452	      z_ru2=1
453	    fi
454	  fi
455	
456	  # Unit 3: Any crucible is charged (bottle container running)
457	  if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- "-bottle$"; then
458	    z_ru3=1
459	  fi
460	
461	  # Unit 4: Kludge-tagged image exists (k-prefixed hallmark)
462	  if docker images --format "{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^k[0-9]"; then
463	    z_ru4=1
464	  fi
465	}
466	
467	######################################################################
468	# Probe director walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_du1..z_du7
469	# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
470	#           or direct extraction).
471	# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
472	#
473	# Vessel assignments per docket:
474	#   Unit 2,4,6: rbev-sentry-debian-slim (conjure vessel)
475	#   Unit 5:     rbev-bottle-plantuml    (bind vessel)
476	#
477	# Probes use local filesystem + docker only (no GAR API, no gcloud).
478	# Units 3-7 check docker image tags — these require the user to have
479	# summoned (pulled) the result locally after cloud operations.
480	# Unit 6 (graft) is detectable without summoning because graft tags
481	# the local image before pushing.
482	
483	zrbgm_probe_director_units() {
484	  z_du1=0
485	  z_du2=0
486	  z_du3=0
487	  z_du4=0
488	  z_du5=0
489	  z_du6=0
490	  z_du7=0
491	
492	  # Unit 1: Director credential file exists
493	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
494	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
495	    z_du1=1
496	  fi
497	
498	  # Units 2-7 require Docker
499	  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi
500	
501	  # Build GAR image prefix for this depot
502	  local z_project_id=""
503	  local z_region=""
504	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
505	    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
506	    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
507	  fi
508	  if test -z "${z_region}" || test -z "${z_project_id}"; then return 0; fi
509	
510	  local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
511	  local -r z_docker_images="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbgm_probe_director_images.txt"
512	  local -r z_docker_stderr="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbgm_probe_director_stderr.txt"
513	
514	  # Collect docker images into temp file
515	  docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
516	    > "${z_docker_images}" 2>"${z_docker_stderr}" \
517	    || return 0
518	
519	  # Load lines matching this depot's GAR prefix into array
520	  local z_depot_images=()
521	  local z_line=""
522	  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
523	    case "${z_line}" in
524	      "${z_gar_prefix}"*) z_depot_images+=("${z_line}") ;;
525	    esac
526	  done < "${z_docker_images}"
527	
528	  # Single pass: match hallmark tag patterns via case
529	  local z_conjure_found=0
530	  local z_i=0
531	  for z_i in "${!z_depot_images[@]}"; do
532	    case "${z_depot_images[$z_i]}" in
533	      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:k"[0-9]*) z_du2=1 ;;
534	      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_found=1 ;;
535	      *"rbev-bottle-plantuml:b"[0-9]*)    z_du5=1 ;;
536	      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:g"[0-9]*) z_du6=1 ;;
537	    esac
538	  done
539	
540	  # Conjure implies depot foundation (reliquary + enshrine are prerequisites)
541	  if test "${z_conjure_found}" = "1"; then
542	    z_du3=1
543	    z_du4=1
544	  fi
545	
546	  # Unit 7: All three modes present
547	  if test "${z_du4}" = "1" && test "${z_du5}" = "1" && test "${z_du6}" = "1"; then
548	    z_du7=1
549	  fi
550	}
551	
552	######################################################################
553	# Probe governor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_gu1..z_gu3
554	# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
555	#           or direct extraction).
556	# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
557	#
558	# Unit 1: Governor credential installed
559	# Unit 2: Retriever AND director credentials installed (governor created them)
560	# Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image has been pulled locally
561	#         (proves the full charter/knight → IAM → access chain works)
562	
563	zrbgm_probe_governor_units() {
564	  z_gu1=0; z_gu2=0; z_gu3=0
565	
566	  # Unit 1: Governor credential file exists
567	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
568	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
569	    z_gu1=1
570	  fi
571	
572	  # Unit 2: Both retriever AND director credential files exist
573	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
574	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" && \
575	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
576	    z_gu2=1
577	  fi
578	
579	  # Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image exists locally
580	  # This proves the SAs the governor created actually work (IAM grants applied).
581	  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi
582	
583	  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
584	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
585	    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
586	    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
587	  fi
588	  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
589	    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
590	    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
591	      z_gu3=1
592	    fi
593	  fi
594	}
595	
596	######################################################################
597	# Probe payor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_pu1..z_pu4
598	# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set.
599	# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
600	#
601	# Unit 1: OAuth credential present (rbro-payor.env in secrets dir)
602	# Unit 2: Payor project configured (RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
603	# Unit 3: Depot provisioned (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
604	# Unit 4: Governor SA exists (governor credential file present)
605	
606	zrbgm_probe_payor_units() {
607	  z_pu1=0
608	  z_pu2=0
609	  z_pu3=0
610	  z_pu4=0
611	
612	  # Unit 1: OAuth credential present
613	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
614	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/rbro-payor.env"; then
615	    z_pu1=1
616	  fi
617	
618	  # Unit 2: Payor project configured
619	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"; then
620	    local z_probe_line=""
621	    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
622	      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu2=1; break ;; esac
623	    done < "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
624	  fi
625	
626	  # Unit 3: Depot provisioned
627	  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
628	    local z_probe_line=""
629	    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
630	      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu3=1; break ;; esac
631	    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
632	  fi
633	
634	  # Unit 4: Governor SA credential file exists
635	  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
636	     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
637	    z_pu4=1
638	  fi
639	}

641	# Configuration review — displayed at level 0 (first thing a newcomer sees)
642	# Shows pre-selected RBRR defaults with orientation, plus BURC project structure.
643	# No sentinel: runs pre-kindle like the rest of the onboarding guide.
644	zrbgm_po_review_defaults() {
645	  local z_rbrr_file="${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
646	
647	  # --- Pre-selected RBRR defaults ---
648	  buh_section "Pre-selected Defaults"
649	  buh_tc "  File: " "${z_rbrr_file}"
650	  buh_t  "  Edit this file if any defaults don't fit, then re-run this guide."
651	  buh_e
652	  buh_t  "  Infrastructure:"
653	  buh_tc "    RBRR_DNS_SERVER                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_DNS_SERVER)"
654	  buh_t  "      Resolver for bottle network connectivity checks (Google Public DNS)."
655	  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE          " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE)"
656	  buh_t  "      Compute Engine type for Cloud Build workers. Smallest reasonable option;"
657	  buh_t  "      balances cost and build speed."
658	  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT               " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT)"
659	  buh_t  "      Maximum time for a single Cloud Build job (20 minutes)."
660	  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS)"
661	  buh_t  "      Preflight gate: require capacity for this many parallel builds."
662	  buh_t  "      With e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU) and default 10-CPU quota, 5 are possible."
663	  buh_e
664	  buh_t  "  Conventions:"
665	  buh_tc "    RBRR_VESSEL_DIR                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_VESSEL_DIR)"
666	  buh_t  "      Directory containing vessel specifications — what gets built into"
667	  buh_t  "      container images."
668	  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCP_REGION                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCP_REGION)"
669	  buh_t  "      GCP region for all infrastructure. Change if you need geographic"
670	  buh_t  "      proximity to a different region."
671	  buh_tc "    RBRR_SECRETS_DIR               " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_SECRETS_DIR)"
672	  buh_t  "      Local directory for credential files, outside the repo for security."
673	  buh_t  "      Created automatically when credentials are first installed."
674	  buh_e
675	
676	  # --- BURC project structure (read-only orientation) ---
677	  buh_section "Project Structure (BURC regime — rarely needs changing)"
678	  buh_tc "    BURC_TOOLS_DIR                 " "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}"
679	  buh_t  "      Tool modules — the kit scripts that implement every operation."
680	  buh_tc "    BURC_TABTARGET_DIR             " "${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}"
681	  buh_t  "      Launcher scripts. Tab-complete these in your terminal to run commands."
682	  buh_tc "    BURC_STATION_FILE              " "${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
683	  buh_t  "      Developer-local settings (log directory). Lives outside the repo."
684	  buh_tc "    BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR             " "${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}"
685	  buh_t  "      Temporary working files for each command run. Outside the repo."
686	  buh_tc "    BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR           " "${BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR}"
687	  buh_t  "      Persistent command output. Outside the repo."
688	  buh_tc "    BURC_MANAGED_KITS              " "${BURC_MANAGED_KITS}"
689	  buh_t  "      Kit modules managed by the vvx toolchain."
690	  buh_e
691	}

file.content:
zrbgm_d      "      - Use JSON file downloaded during rbgm_payor_establish"
  zrbgm_d      "   For refresh/renewal:"
  zrbgm_dld    "      - Go to: " "Credentials for Payor Project" "https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  zrbgm_dm     "      - Find existing " "${RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME}" " OAuth client"
  zrbgm_d      "      - Click the OAuth client name to open details"
  zrbgm_d      "      - To rotate secret if compromised:"
  zrbgm_dm     "        a. Click " "+ Add secret"
  zrbgm_d      "        b. Click the download icon next to the NEW secret"
  zrbgm_dm     "           Browser downloads: " "client_secret_[id].apps.googleusercontent.com.json"
  zrbgm_dmd    "        c. Click " "Disable" " on the secret with the older creation date"
  zrbgm_d      "        d. Click the trash icon to delete that disabled secret"
  zrbgm_e
  zrbgm_s2     "2. Install/Refresh OAuth Credentials:"
  zrbgm_d      "   Run the payor install command with the downloaded JSON:"
  zrbgm_dc     "      " "rbgp_payor_install ~/Downloads/client_secret_*.json"
  zrbgm_d      "   This will:"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Guide you through OAuth authorization flow"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Store secure credentials in RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/rbro-payor.env"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Update RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID in rbrp.env"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Test the authentication"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Initialize depot tracking"
  zrbgm_d      "   - Reset the 6-month expiration timer"
  zrbgm_e
  zrbgm_s2     "3. Verify Installation:"
  zrbgm_d      "   Test with a simple operation:"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_LIST_DEPOT}"
  zrbgm_d      "   Should display current depots without authentication errors."
  zrbgm_e
  zrbgm_d      "Prevention: Run any Payor operation monthly to prevent expiration."

  buc_success "OAuth credential installation/refresh procedure displayed"
}

rbgm_quota_build() {
  zrbgm_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Display the Cloud Build capacity review procedure to verify machine type and quota settings"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buh_section  "Cloud Build Concurrent Build Capacity"
  buh_t        "Review your build capacity settings to ensure sufficient concurrent build execution."
  buh_t        "Recipe Bottle uses a private worker pool — quota is tracked per private pool host project."
  buh_e
  buh_t        "   Private pool machine types vs concurrency at 10-CPU quota:"
  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-2  " "(2 vCPU)   → 5 concurrent builds"
  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-8  " "(8 vCPU)   → 1 concurrent build"
  buh_tc       "     e2-standard-32 " "(32 vCPU)  → needs 32+ CPU quota"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "Key:"
  buh_tu       "   Magenta text refers to " "precise words you see on the web page."
  buh_tc       "   Cyan text is " "something you might copy from here."
  buh_link     "   Clickable links look like " "EXAMPLE DOT COM" "https://example.com/" " (often, ${ZRBGM_CLICK_MOD} + mouse click)"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "1. Current Regime Configuration:"
  buh_tc       "   RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:          " "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCP_REGION:                " "${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE:          " "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}"
  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM:             " "${RBRR_GCB_POOL_STEM}"
  buh_tc       "   RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS: " "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"
  buh_e
  buh_t        "   The build preflight gate checks quota automatically before each build."
  buh_t        "   It computes: quota_vCPUs / machine_vCPUs >= RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "2. Check CPU Quota:"
  buh_t        "   Private pool quota is tracked under the depot project."
  buh_e
  buh_link     "   Go to: " "Quotas & System Limits (opens to depot project)" "https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tu       "   1. Verify project " "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" " is selected in the project picker"
  buh_tut      "   2. In the " "Enter property name or value" " filter bar, type:"
  buh_tc       "      " "concurrent_private"
  buh_tut      "   3. Select " "cloudbuild.googleapis.com/concurrent_private_pool_build_cpus" " from the autocomplete"
  buh_t        "   4. Multiple rows appear. Look for the row with Type column showing"
  buh_tut      "      " "Quota" " (not System limit) and your region in the Dimensions column"
  buh_t        "   5. Note the quota value and current usage percentage"
  buh_t        "      If usage is near 100% with one build, the machine type is too large for the quota"
  buh_e
  buh_section  "3. Request a Quota Increase (if needed):"
  buh_tut      "   On the " "Quota" " row identified above:"
  buh_tut      "   1. Click the three-dot menu " "⋮" " at the right end of the row"
  buh_tu       "   2. Select " "Edit quota"
  buh_tu       "   3. In the side panel, enter the new value in the " "New value" " field"
  buh_t        "      Recommended: 10 (allows 5 concurrent e2-standard-2 builds across both pools)"
  buh_tu       "   4. A " "Request description" " field appears. Enter:"
  buh_tc       "      " "Need parallel builds on private worker pool for CI/CD pipeline testing."
  buh_tu       "   5. Click " "Next"
  buh_t        "   6. Step 2/2 shows contact details (pre-filled from your Google account)"
  buh_tu       "   7. Click " "Submit request"
  buh_t        "      Increases are typically approved within minutes."
  buh_e
  buh_section  "4. Confirm Quota Increase:"
  buh_t        "   After approval, quotas can take up to 15 minutes to propagate."
  buh_link     "   Return to: " "Quotas & System Limits (opens to depot project)" "https://console.cloud.google.com/iam-admin/quotas?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  buh_tut      "   Filter for " "concurrent_private" " again and verify the new value"
  buh_t        "   Verify: quota / vCPUs per machine type >= RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS"
  buh_tc       "     Current target: " "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS} concurrent builds"
  buh_e

  buc_success "Cloud Build quota guide displayed"
}


# Dashboard status line — no sentinel (used pre-kindle by onboarding guide)
zrbgm_po_status() {
  local -r z_flag="${1:-}"
  local -r z_text="${2:-}"
  if test "${z_flag}" = "1"; then
    buh_ct " [*] " "${z_text}"
  else
    buh_t " [ ] ${z_text}"
  fi
}

# Extract a KEY=VALUE from a file; stdout empty if missing.  No sourcing.
zrbgm_po_extract_capture() {
  local -r z_file="${1:-}"
  local -r z_key="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_key}"  || return 1
  test -f "${z_file}" || return 1
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line; do
    case "${z_line}" in "${z_key}="*) echo "${z_line#"${z_key}="}"; return 0 ;; esac
  done < "${z_file}"
  return 1
}

######################################################################
# Probe retriever walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_ru1..z_ru4
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
#           or direct extraction).
# No sentinel — works pre-kindle

zrbgm_probe_retriever_units() {
  z_ru1=0; z_ru2=0; z_ru3=0; z_ru4=0

  # Unit 1: Retriever credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_ru1=1
  fi

  # Units 2-4 require Docker
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  # Unit 2: Any image from this depot's GAR exists locally
  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
      z_ru2=1
    fi
  fi

  # Unit 3: Any crucible is charged (bottle container running)
  if docker ps --format "{{.Names}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q -- "-bottle$"; then
    z_ru3=1
  fi

  # Unit 4: Kludge-tagged image exists (k-prefixed hallmark)
  if docker images --format "{{.Tag}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^k[0-9]"; then
    z_ru4=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe director walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_du1..z_du7
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
#           or direct extraction).
# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
#
# Vessel assignments per docket:
#   Unit 2,4,6: rbev-sentry-debian-slim (conjure vessel)
#   Unit 5:     rbev-bottle-plantuml    (bind vessel)
#
# Probes use local filesystem + docker only (no GAR API, no gcloud).
# Units 3-7 check docker image tags — these require the user to have
# summoned (pulled) the result locally after cloud operations.
# Unit 6 (graft) is detectable without summoning because graft tags
# the local image before pushing.

zrbgm_probe_director_units() {
  z_du1=0
  z_du2=0
  z_du3=0
  z_du4=0
  z_du5=0
  z_du6=0
  z_du7=0

  # Unit 1: Director credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_du1=1
  fi

  # Units 2-7 require Docker
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  # Build GAR image prefix for this depot
  local z_project_id=""
  local z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -z "${z_region}" || test -z "${z_project_id}"; then return 0; fi

  local -r z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
  local -r z_docker_images="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbgm_probe_director_images.txt"
  local -r z_docker_stderr="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/zrbgm_probe_director_stderr.txt"

  # Collect docker images into temp file
  docker images --format "{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}" \
    > "${z_docker_images}" 2>"${z_docker_stderr}" \
    || return 0

  # Load lines matching this depot's GAR prefix into array
  local z_depot_images=()
  local z_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_line || test -n "${z_line}"; do
    case "${z_line}" in
      "${z_gar_prefix}"*) z_depot_images+=("${z_line}") ;;
    esac
  done < "${z_docker_images}"

  # Single pass: match hallmark tag patterns via case
  local z_conjure_found=0
  local z_i=0
  for z_i in "${!z_depot_images[@]}"; do
    case "${z_depot_images[$z_i]}" in
      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:k"[0-9]*) z_du2=1 ;;
      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:c"[0-9]*) z_conjure_found=1 ;;
      *"rbev-bottle-plantuml:b"[0-9]*)    z_du5=1 ;;
      *"rbev-sentry-debian-slim:g"[0-9]*) z_du6=1 ;;
    esac
  done

  # Conjure implies depot foundation (reliquary + enshrine are prerequisites)
  if test "${z_conjure_found}" = "1"; then
    z_du3=1
    z_du4=1
  fi

  # Unit 7: All three modes present
  if test "${z_du4}" = "1" && test "${z_du5}" = "1" && test "${z_du6}" = "1"; then
    z_du7=1
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe governor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_gu1..z_gu3
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set (from zrbgm_probe_role_credentials
#           or direct extraction).
# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
#
# Unit 1: Governor credential installed
# Unit 2: Retriever AND director credentials installed (governor created them)
# Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image has been pulled locally
#         (proves the full charter/knight → IAM → access chain works)

zrbgm_probe_governor_units() {
  z_gu1=0; z_gu2=0; z_gu3=0

  # Unit 1: Governor credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_gu1=1
  fi

  # Unit 2: Both retriever AND director credential files exist
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_retriever}/${RBCC_rbra_file}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_director}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_gu2=1
  fi

  # Unit 3: Functional verification — a GAR image exists locally
  # This proves the SAs the governor created actually work (IAM grants applied).
  if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then return 0; fi

  local z_project_id="" z_region=""
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    z_project_id=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID") || z_project_id=""
    z_region=$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${RBBC_rbrr_file}" "RBRR_GCP_REGION") || z_region=""
  fi
  if test -n "${z_region}" && test -n "${z_project_id}"; then
    local z_gar_prefix="${z_region}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${z_project_id}/"
    if docker images --format "{{.Repository}}" 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^${z_gar_prefix}"; then
      z_gu3=1
    fi
  fi
}

######################################################################
# Probe payor walkthrough units — sets caller-scope z_pu1..z_pu4
# Requires: z_secrets_dir already set.
# No sentinel — works pre-kindle
#
# Unit 1: OAuth credential present (rbro-payor.env in secrets dir)
# Unit 2: Payor project configured (RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
# Unit 3: Depot provisioned (RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID non-empty)
# Unit 4: Governor SA exists (governor credential file present)

zrbgm_probe_payor_units() {
  z_pu1=0
  z_pu2=0
  z_pu3=0
  z_pu4=0

  # Unit 1: OAuth credential present
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/rbro-payor.env"; then
    z_pu1=1
  fi

  # Unit 2: Payor project configured
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"; then
    local z_probe_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu2=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
  fi

  # Unit 3: Depot provisioned
  if test -f "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"; then
    local z_probe_line=""
    while IFS= read -r z_probe_line; do
      case "${z_probe_line}" in RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID=?*) z_pu3=1; break ;; esac
    done < "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  fi

  # Unit 4: Governor SA credential file exists
  if test -n "${z_secrets_dir}" && \
     test -f "${z_secrets_dir}/${RBCC_role_governor}/${RBCC_rbra_file}"; then
    z_pu4=1
  fi
}

# Configuration review — displayed at level 0 (first thing a newcomer sees)
# Shows pre-selected RBRR defaults with orientation, plus BURC project structure.
# No sentinel: runs pre-kindle like the rest of the onboarding guide.
zrbgm_po_review_defaults() {
  local z_rbrr_file="${RBBC_rbrr_file}"

  # --- Pre-selected RBRR defaults ---
  buh_section "Pre-selected Defaults"
  buh_tc "  File: " "${z_rbrr_file}"
  buh_t  "  Edit this file if any defaults don't fit, then re-run this guide."
  buh_e
  buh_t  "  Infrastructure:"
  buh_tc "    RBRR_DNS_SERVER                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_DNS_SERVER)"
  buh_t  "      Resolver for bottle network connectivity checks (Google Public DNS)."
  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE          " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE)"
  buh_t  "      Compute Engine type for Cloud Build workers. Smallest reasonable option;"
  buh_t  "      balances cost and build speed."
  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT               " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT)"
  buh_t  "      Maximum time for a single Cloud Build job (20 minutes)."
  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS)"
  buh_t  "      Preflight gate: require capacity for this many parallel builds."
  buh_t  "      With e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU) and default 10-CPU quota, 5 are possible."
  buh_e
  buh_t  "  Conventions:"
  buh_tc "    RBRR_VESSEL_DIR                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_VESSEL_DIR)"
  buh_t  "      Directory containing vessel specifications — what gets built into"
  buh_t  "      container images."
  buh_tc "    RBRR_GCP_REGION                " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_GCP_REGION)"
  buh_t  "      GCP region for all infrastructure. Change if you need geographic"
  buh_t  "      proximity to a different region."
  buh_tc "    RBRR_SECRETS_DIR               " "$(zrbgm_po_extract_capture "${z_rbrr_file}" RBRR_SECRETS_DIR)"
  buh_t  "      Local directory for credential files, outside the repo for security."
  buh_t  "      Created automatically when credentials are first installed."
  buh_e

  # --- BURC project structure (read-only orientation) ---
  buh_section "Project Structure (BURC regime — rarely needs changing)"
  buh_tc "    BURC_TOOLS_DIR                 " "${BURC_TOOLS_DIR}"
  buh_t  "      Tool modules — the kit scripts that implement every operation."
  buh_tc "    BURC_TABTARGET_DIR             " "${BURC_TABTARGET_DIR}"
  buh_t  "      Launcher scripts. Tab-complete these in your terminal to run commands."
  buh_tc "    BURC_STATION_FILE              " "${BURC_STATION_FILE}"
  buh_t  "      Developer-local settings (log directory). Lives outside the repo."
  buh_tc "    BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR             " "${BURC_TEMP_ROOT_DIR}"
  buh_t  "      Temporary working files for each command run. Outside the repo."
  buh_tc "    BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR           " "${BURC_OUTPUT_ROOT_DIR}"
  buh_t  "      Persistent command output. Outside the repo."
  buh_tc "    BURC_MANAGED_KITS              " "${BURC_MANAGED_KITS}"
  buh_t  "      Kit modules managed by the vvx toolchain."
  buh_e
}
